name: Baron
instructions:
+1 Buy
You may discard an Estate for +$4. If you don't, gain an Estate.

name: Bridge
instructions:
+1 Buy
+$1
This turn, cards (everywhere) cost $1 less.

name: Conspirator
instructions:
+$2
If you've played 3 or more Actions this turn (counting this), +1 Card and +1 Action.

name: Coppersmith
instructions: Copper produces an extra $1 this turn.

name: Courtier
instructions: Reveal a card from your hand. For each type it has (Action, Attack, etc.), choose one: +1 Action; or +1 Buy; or +$3; or gain a Gold. The choices must be different.

name: Courtyard
instructions:
+3 Cards
Put a card from your hand onto your deck.

name: Diplomat
instructions:
+2 Cards
If you have 5 or fewer cards in hand (after drawing), +2 Actions.
-----
When another player plays an Attack card, you may first reveal this from a hand of 5 or more cards, to draw 2 cards then discard 3.

name: Duke
instructions: Worth 1 VP per Duchy you have.

name: Great Hall
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
-----
1 VP

name: Ironworks
instructions:
Gain a card costing up to $4.
If the gained card is an...
Action card, +1 Action
Treasure card, +$1
Victory card, +1 Card

name: Lurker
instructions:
+1 Action
Choose one: Trash an Action card from the Supply; or gain an Action card from the trash.

name: Masquerade
instructions:
+2 Cards
Each player with any cards in hand passes one to the next such player to their left, at once. Then you may trash a card from your hand.

name: Mill
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
You may discard 2 cards. If you do, +$2.
-----
1 VP

name: Mining Village
instructions:
+1 Card
+2 Actions
You may trash this for +$2.

name: Minion
instructions:
+1 Action
Choose one: +$2; or discard your hand, +4 Cards, and each other player with at least 5 cards in hand discards their hand and draws 4 cards.

name: Nobles
instructions:
Choose one: +3 Cards; or +2 Actions.
-----
2 VP

name: Patrol
instructions:
+3 Cards
Reveal the top 4 cards of your deck. Put the Victory cards and Curses into your hand. Put the rest back in any order.

name: Pawn
instructions: Choose two: +1 Card; +1 Action; +1 Buy; +$1. The choices must be different.

name: Replace
instructions: Trash a card from your hand. Gain a card costing up to $2 more than it. If the gained card is an Action or Treasure, put it onto your deck; if it's a Victory card, each other player gains a Curse.

name: Saboteur
instructions: Each other player reveals cards from the top of their deck until revealing one costing $3 or more. They trash that card and may gain a card costing at most $2 less than it. They discard the other revealed cards.

name: Scout
instructions:
+1 Action
Reveal the top 4 cards of your deck. Put the revealed Victory cards into your hand. Put the other cards on top of your deck in any order.

name: Secret Chamber
instructions:
Discard any number of cards. +$1 per card discarded.
-----
When another player plays an Attack card, you may reveal this from your hand. If you do, +2 Cards, then put 2 cards from your hand on top of your deck.

name: Secret Passage
instructions:
+2 Cards
+1 Action
Take a card from your hand and put it anywhere in your deck.

name: Shanty Town
instructions:
+2 Actions
Reveal your hand. If you have no Action cards in hand, +2 Cards.

name: Steward
instructions: Choose one: +2 Cards; or +$2; or trash 2 cards from your hand.

name: Swindler
instructions:
+$2
Each other player trashes the top card of their deck and gains a card with the same cost that you choose.

name: Torturer
instructions:
+3 Cards
Each other player either discards 2 cards or gains a Curse to their hand, their choice. (They may pick an option they can't do.)

name: Trading Post
instructions: Trash 2 cards from your hand. If you did, gain a Silver to your hand.

name: Tribute
instructions:
The player to your left reveals then discards the top 2 cards of their deck. For each differently named card revealed, if it is an...
Action Card, +2 Actions
Treasure Card, +$2
Victory Card, +2 Cards

name: Upgrade
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
Trash a card from your hand. Gain a card costing exactly $1 more than it.

name: Wishing Well
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
Name a card, then reveal the top card of your deck. If you named it, put it into your hand.
